name: Fillet of Fish a L'orange
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Teaspoon Dried whole Italian seasoning mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Layer half of the chopped green onions and sliced mushrooms in a greased 9-inch baking dish.
2. Add the flounder fillets to the dish and sprinkle with salt, pepper, and dried Italian seasoning.
3. Add the remaining chopped green onions and sliced mushrooms on top of the fish.
4. In a small bowl, combine olive oil, soy sauce, white wine, orange juice, and Curacau liqueur.
5. Pour the mixture over the vegetables and fish.
6. Cover the dish with foil or parchment paper.
7. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes, or until the fish is opaque.
8. Sprinkle with paprika and minced parsley before serving.
